message:
chore: expand .gitignore with beads recovery and agent scratch patterns

Add missing patterns for:
- .beads/*.bad_* / .beads/recovery*/ / .beads_recovery/ (beads DB
  recovery artifacts from corruption repair cycles)
- Root-level *.txt, *.log, *.json, *.out, *.py, *.sh (agent-generated
  scratch output and one-off scripts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -155,3 +155,19 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 .beads/*.pre_repair_*
 .beads/*.repair_candidate_*
 .beads/*.bak-corrupt
+
+# Beads ephemeral artifacts (recovery, bad/rebuild snapshots)
+.beads/*.bad_*
+.beads/*.backup_*
+.beads/*.rebuild_*
+.beads/recovery*/
+.beads_recovery/
+
+# Root-level agent scratch output
+/*.txt
+/*.log
+/*.json
+!package.json
+/*.out
+/*.py
+/*.sh
